reportSummary: Every click (Trending, Register, Politics) is intercepted by a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” page that never resolves, so navigation can’t be exercised at all. URLs change to the expected endpoints but no content loads and no in‑site links are available to proceed. Multiple SSL/resource errors and a critical meta‑refresh accessibility violation make the experience feel broken. Conversion is impossible because the Register page never appears.
